title: Contract Incentive Calculator
description: Industrial-grade tool for calculating contract incentive payouts based on performance metrics, quality, delivery, and cost efficiency. Aligns with ISO 9001, Lean Six Sigma, and WERC standards.

inputs.label: Actual Throughput (units)
inputs.businessContext: Total units produced or delivered in the measurement period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total units produced or delivered in the measurement period.

inputs.label: Defect Rate (ppm)
inputs.businessContext: Parts per million defective, measured per Six Sigma standards.

businessContext_i18n.en: Parts per million defective, measured per Six Sigma standards.

inputs.label: On-Time Delivery (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of orders delivered on or before the promised date.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of orders delivered on or before the promised date.

inputs.label: Cost per Unit ($)
inputs.businessContext: Total manufacturing cost per unit, including materials, labor, overhead.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total manufacturing cost per unit, including materials, labor, overhead.

inputs.label: Target Cost per Unit ($)
inputs.businessContext: Contractually agreed cost target per unit.

businessContext_i18n.en: Contractually agreed cost target per unit.

inputs.label: Incentive Base Rate ($/unit)
inputs.businessContext: Base incentive amount per unit, subject to performance multipliers.

businessContext_i18n.en: Base incentive amount per unit, subject to performance multipliers.

inputs.label: Quality Threshold (ppm)
inputs.businessContext: Maximum defect rate to qualify for any incentive.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum defect rate to qualify for any incentive.

inputs.label: Delivery Threshold (%)
inputs.businessContext: Minimum on-time delivery percentage to qualify for incentive.

businessContext_i18n.en: Minimum on-time delivery percentage to qualify for incentive.

inputs.label: Cost Reduction Sharing (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of cost savings shared as additional incentive.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of cost savings shared as additional incentive.

inputs.label: Contract Type
inputs.businessContext: Type of contract governing the incentive structure.

businessContext_i18n.en: Type of contract governing the incentive structure.

inputs.label: Lean Certification Active
inputs.businessContext: Indicates if the supplier holds an active Lean certification (e.g., ISO 18404).

businessContext_i18n.en: Indicates if the supplier holds an active Lean certification (e.g., ISO 18404).

rules.message: Throughput values must be non-negative and target must be positive.
Defect rate must be between 0 and 1,000,000 ppm.
On-time delivery percentage must be between 0 and 100.
Cost per unit must be non-negative and target must be positive.
Incentive base rate must be non-negative.
Cost reduction sharing percentage must be between 0 and 100.

thresholds.message: Defect rate exceeds quality threshold. Incentive may be reduced or null.
On-time delivery below threshold. Incentive may be reduced or null.
Cost per unit exceeds target. Cost reduction sharing will not apply.
Throughput is less than 80% of target. Consider capacity improvement.
